scope_summary: Find one real later FireFlow approval, review, plan, implementation, or request-progression branch that is not just journal refresh or UserSession maintenance. Prefer a minute where POST /FireFlow/FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher lines up with a non-UserSession destination in fireflow.log or stronger workflow evidence such as aff.job, config.topic0, StartWorker.pl, ms-batch-application, or ms-configuration reaction. Correlate the same minute across Apache FireFlow or AFF access, fireflow.log, aff-boot or neighboring microservice logs, PostgreSQL, and ActiveMQ broker log or store evidence. Decide whether this branch stays synchronous, becomes config-propagation centered, or finally justifies earlier ActiveMQ promotion for an approval or progression workflow branch. Capture exact timestamps, destination names, and artifact evidence. Do not mutate appliance state.
